column1: Look at those black clouds. It ______ rain.
Those shoes are well-made. They ____ last a long time.
What are your plans for your future job? - I________a teacher.
- Why are you turning on the TV? - I _____ watch the news.
Greta is still sleeping. She__________late for work.
- I don't know how to use the washing machine. - It's easy. I ____ show you.
- Where are you going? Are you going shopping? - Yes, I ______ buy some things for dinner tonight.
- Did you call Liza? - Oh, no. I completely forgot. I ____ call her now.
- I _____ make some coffee? - Would you like some?
- I ___ see you at 10:30 at the hotel lobby, OK?
